question: [File: 'File Name: pinger/sdk_client.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: newClient()] Can an unprivileged external user poison the mirror REST endpoint (cfg.mirrorRest) response so that buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() returns only unresponsive node addresses, causing newClient() to build a client that stalls all transaction submissions for 500%+ of average block time?
